title: Reading and Interpreting a Data Table

steps.instruction: A table shows ice cream sales: Mon=12, Tue=18, Wed=15, Thu=20, Fri=25.
steps.explanation: Tables organize data in rows and columns.
90 ice creams were sold during the week.
The busiest day was Friday with 25 sales.
The range shows how spread out the data is.

title: Creating a Data Table from Collected Data

steps.instruction: Survey results: red, blue, red, green, blue, blue, red, green, blue.
steps.explanation: Count how many times each choice appears.

steps.instruction: Make columns for category and count.
steps.explanation: Tables have clear headers and organized rows.
Tables make it easy to compare values at a glance.
